Tokuryū.description: Tokuryū is a term coined by Japan's National Police Agency for loosely organized criminal groups that have emerged as an alternative to traditional yakuza. They are decentralized, recruit online via social media and encrypted apps, and engage in fraud, drug trafficking, robberies, and contract killings. Their anonymous and fluid structure makes them difficult to investigate.

descriptions: Tokuryū groups are described as an alternative to traditional yakuza organizations.
edges.evidence_quote: Tokuryū (匿流) is a term coined by Japan's National Police Agency (NPA) to describe a new and growing form of loosely organized criminal groups that have emerged as an alternative to traditional yakuza organizations.

Kyokuto-kai.description: The Kyokuto-kai is a yakuza organization based in Tokyo, Japan, founded by Aiji Sekiguchi. It was registered as a designated yakuza group under the Organized Crime Countermeasures Law in July 1993. In the early 2000s, it was involved in a feud with the rival Matsuba-kai, leading to a number of shootings. As of the article, it has approximately 300 members and is led by Jin Takahashi.

descriptions: Kyokuto-kai and Matsuba-kai were in a feud involving shootings.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 2000s, the Kyokuto-kai was involved in a feud with the rival Matsuba-kai , which led to a number of shootings.

descriptions: Matsuba-kai and Kyokuto-kai were involved in a violent feud in the early 2000s.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 2000s the Matsuba-kai was involved in a violent feud with the rival Kyokuto-kai , which led to a number of shootings.

Brothers' Circle.description: The Brothers' Circle is a term used to refer to Russian organized crime, commonly the Russian mafia. It is a loose translation of the Russian term 'Bratva', meaning brotherhood. The group is composed of leaders and senior members of several criminal organizations based in Europe, sharing a common ideology based on the thief in law tradition. Its existence is debated, with some experts viewing it as a label for disparate gangs rather than a single organization.

descriptions: The Brothers' Circle is a term used to refer to the Russian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers' Circle or Bratski Krug is a term used to refer to Russian organized crime, commonly the Russian mafia.

descriptions: The infobox lists Bratva as an ally of the Serb mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels , Brödraskapet , Fucked For Life , Bratva , Obshchak , Zemun Clan , Serb Volunteer Guard

descriptions: Several members of the Brothers' Circle are thieves-in-law, indicating a membership overlap.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2011, the Obama administration implemented sanctions against an organization known as the Brothers' Circle , several members of which are thieves-in-law.

Mongols Motorcycle Club.description: International outlaw motorcycle club formed in Montebello, California in 1969 by a group of Hispanic bikers, many of whom were Vietnam veterans. Designated an organized crime group by the U.S. Department of Justice, Australian Federal Police, and Europol. The club has approximately 5,000 full-patched members across 19 U.S. states and 29 countries, making it the third-largest outlaw biker club globally.

descriptions: Ghetto Brothers attempted to negotiate a truce with Mongols.
edges.evidence_quote: On December 2, 1971, Cornell Benjamin, known as "Black Benjie", a former heroin addict turned community activist who had joined the Bronx gang the Ghetto Brothers and become their minister of peace, led a delegation to meet with members of rival gangs the Mongols, the Savage Skulls, and the Seven Immortals in order to negotiate a truce.

descriptions: Mongols absorbed most Finks members in a patch-over in 2013.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2013, a deal was brokered to 'patch over' the Finks ahead of a proposed ban on the Finks under anti-gang legislation in Queensland. An estimated 90% of the Finks' members joined the Mongols.

descriptions: Mongols and Glendale Night Riders jointly committed a sexual assault in 1972.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Glendale Mongols chapter, along with bikers from the San Bernardino chapter of the Hells Angels, the Straight Satans of Venice, and the Glendale Night Riders, committed a sexual assault on a fifteen-year-old girl in August 1972.

descriptions: The Mongols clashed with Hells Angels in Las Vegas in 2002.
edges.evidence_quote: Their involvement in criminal activities such as assault, intimidation, and murder is well-documented, including a highly publicized clash with members of the rival Hells Angels gang in Las Vegas in 2002.

descriptions: Mongols expanded into Hells Angels territory in Cologne.
edges.evidence_quote: Local daily newspaper Kölnische Rundschau reports that a further German Mongols chapter has become active in Cologne, which is a traditional Hells Angels area.

descriptions: Mongols and Hells Angels fought in a brawl in Rotterdam in 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Mongols and the Hells Angels took part in a mass brawl in the bar of the Van der Valk Hotel in Rotterdam, during which several shots were fired, on the evening of 7 April 2016.

descriptions: Mongols consider Hells Angels as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rival gangs include the Bandidos, the Hells Angels, the Iron Order, the Outlaws, and the Vagos.

descriptions: Hells Angels declared war on Mongols in 1977 over the California patch.
edges.evidence_quote: When the Mongols defied the Hells Angels' warnings to cease wearing the California patch, the Angels voted unanimously at a club meeting on July 7, 1977 in favor of declaring war on their rivals.

descriptions: The feud between Mongols and Hells Angels was reactivated after a fight at a trade show.
edges.evidence_quote: The feud between the clubs in Southern California was reactivated, however, by a fight at the first annual Easyriders trade show...

descriptions: Mongols expanded into Northern California in defiance of the peace treaty, causing tension.

descriptions: Mongols and Hells Angels fought in a brawl and shoot-out at Harrah's Laughlin.
edges.evidence_quote: On April 27, 2002, between 60 and 70 members of the Mongols and the Hells Angels took part in a brawl and shoot-out on the casino floor at Harrah's Laughlin...

descriptions: Mongols member killed Hells Angels chapter president.
edges.evidence_quote: Christopher Bryan "Stoney" Ablett, a member of the Mongols' Modesto chapter, stabbed and shot San Francisco Hells Angels chapter president Mark "Papa" Guardado to death...

descriptions: Hells Angels possibly retaliated against Mongols with pipe bombs.
edges.evidence_quote: On September 18, 2008, three pipe bombs exploded in the driveway of the San Jose home of Robert Rios, the president of the Mongols' Santa Clara chapter. The ATF described the bombing... as a possible act of retaliation by the Angels for the death of Guardado.

descriptions: Mongols member shot and wounded a Hells Angels member.
edges.evidence_quote: On November 8, 2008, Hells Angels member Robert Daniel Thompson was shot several times and wounded by Mongols biker Eric Gunner "The Mayor" Lundin...

descriptions: Mongols prospect attempted to shoot a Hells Angels biker.
edges.evidence_quote: Mongols "prospect" Jose Luis Sanchez injured three people when he fired eight to ten rounds... in an attempt to shoot a Hells Angels biker...

descriptions: Mongols and Hells Angels brawled on Interstate 15.
edges.evidence_quote: Two Hells Angels members suffered stab wounds during a brawl involving dozens of Mongols and Hells Angels bikers... on Interstate 15 near Temecula, on March 22, 2014.

descriptions: Mongols and Hells Angels exchanged gunfire near Corona.
edges.evidence_quote: On September 20, 2014, Mongols and Hells Angels exchanged gunfire near Corona.

descriptions: Mongols member killed a Hells Angel and wounded another.
edges.evidence_quote: Mongols member Joshua Ryan Herbert opened fire... on a group of five Hells Angels bikers... on May 21, 2017, killing one Hells Angel, James Duty, and wounding another.

descriptions: Mongols confronted Hells Angels at a fundraiser, leading to a shooting.

edges.evidence_quote: On 24 October 2022, during the Russo-Ukrainian War, the club formed a volunteer unit which joined the Pyatnashka International Brigade.

descriptions: Clan Gionta strengthened ties with the Chierchia clan through marriage.

Scissionisti di Secondigliano.description: The Scissionisti di Secondigliano, also known as the Amato-Pagano clan, is a Camorra clan based in the Secondigliano district of Naples, Italy. Founded in 2004 by Raffaele Amato and Cesare Pagano, it split from the Di Lauro clan and became a major force in international drug trafficking, with a strong presence in Spain. The group engaged in a violent feud with the Di Lauro clan in 2004-2005, resulting in over 100 murders. Currently, it remains one of the most important Camorra organizations.

descriptions: Albanian mafia has alliances with the Amato-Pagano clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the Albanian mafia has alliances with many Camorra clans, including with the Mazzarella clan and the Amato-Pagano clan

descriptions: The Scissionisti di Secondigliano is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Scissionisti di Secondigliano is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the Albanian mafia has alliances with the Mazzarella clan and with the Scissionisti di Secondigliano

descriptions: Scissionisti di Secondigliano is a Camorra clan in contact with Albanian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalla seconda relazione semestrale del 2010 della DIA vengono illustrati contatti tra la mafia albanese e il clan Mazzarella, con gli Scissionisti di Secondigliano e il clan Serino di Sarno.

descriptions: Francesco Abbinante sided with the Scissionisti, a splinter group.
edges.evidence_quote: prima di schierarsi con gli Scissionisti

descriptions: The Palermiti clan, as part of the Parisi-Palermiti alliance, fought against the Scissionisti.

edges.evidence_quote: tessere una tela molto importante con gli Amato-Pagano

descriptions: The Di Lauro clan and the Scissionisti di Secondigliano fought a bloody feud.
edges.evidence_quote: the Di Lauro clan and the so-called Scissionisti di Secondigliano fought a bloody feud which came to be known ... as the Scampia feud.

descriptions: The Di Lauro clan was at war with the Scissionisti di Secondigliano.
edges.evidence_quote: the Scissionistis with whom the Di Lauro clan was at war

descriptions: Scissionisti di Secondigliano are former allies turned rivals, engaged in a power struggle.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of Di Lauro's former allies formed a rival alliance (Scissionisti di Secondigliano) and started a bloody power struggle in 2004 known as the Scampia feud.

descriptions: Di Lauro clan and Scissionisti di Secondigliano were in conflict.

La Raza Nation.description: La Raza Nation is a street gang founded in Chicago in 1973, primarily composed of Hispanic individuals of Mexican or Central American origin. The gang is affiliated with the Folk Nation and has been involved in conflicts with rival gangs such as the Almighty Saints, Latin Kings, and Black P. Stones. Its activities have expanded beyond Chicago to states including Wisconsin, Ohio, Florida, and Georgia. The gang remains active as of the 2000s.

Noua Dreaptă.description: Ultranationalist, far-right organization in Romania and Moldova, founded in 2000. Claims to be successor to the Iron Guard, promoting militant ultranationalism and Orthodox Christian convictions. Opposes sexual minorities, Roma, abortion, communism, globalization, EU, NATO, and non-Orthodox religions. Supports merger of Romania and Moldova.

descriptions: Noua Dreaptă is a member of the Alliance for Peace and Freedom.
edges.evidence_quote: As of 30 May 2018, Noua Dreaptă is a member of the Alliance for Peace and Freedom

descriptions: Ait Soussan organisation kidnapped a member of El Ballouti clan due to rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: Houssine Ait Soussan allegedly kidnapped him as revenge, because Colombian cartels preferred to work with the El Ballouti clan instead of his organisation.

descriptions: Ait Soussan organisation kidnapped a trafficker who worked with Israeli mafia.

descriptions: Turtle clan stole cocaine intended for Ait Soussan organisation, sparking conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Several members of the clan were behind the theft of 200 kg of cocaine at the Port of Antwerp in 2012, which were intended for Benaouf A., the right-hand man of Houssine Ait Soussan.

Los Pelones.description: Los Pelones is an enforcer gang originally part of the Sinaloa Cartel, founded in 2004 in Guerrero, Mexico. It distributed narcotics in tourist spots and later became independent after the Beltrán-Leyva split. The group allied with the Gulf Cartel in 2012 but became independent again by 2020 due to fragmentation. It is involved in drug trafficking, murder, and extortion.

descriptions: Los Pelones were formerly enforcers of the Beltrán-Leyva Organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Pelones in Morelos. These are former enforcers of the Beltrán-Leyva brothers, now part of the Gulf Cartel.

descriptions: Los Pelones is a splinter group of Beltrán Leyva.
edges.evidence_quote: Fragmentación ... - Los Pelones en el Estado de México , Chiapas , Quintana Roo y Morelos .

descriptions: Los Pelones emerged from fragmentation of Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Pelones emerged as an independent cartel during this fragmentation as well.

descriptions: CJNG is in conflict with Los Pelones for territory.
edges.evidence_quote: still was unable to take away territory in other parts of southeastern Mexico controlled by the Sinaloa Cartel, Los Zetas and the so-called Los Pelones group.

descriptions: Los Pelones worked for the Beltrán Leyva Cartel, reporting on operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Édgar Valdez Villarreal ―alias La Barbie (basado en la muñeca estadounidense)―, un sicario que trabajaba para Arturo Beltrán, había formado desde 2006 una organización de asesinos a sueldo y narcomenudistas llamada Los Pelones a la cual se integró Cleotilde Toribio Rentería ―alias El Tilde―. Instruido por La Barbie, Rentería comenzó a trabajar para los Beltrán rindiéndoles cuentas sobre las operaciones del cártel en el estado de Guerrero.

descriptions: Los Pelones lists Gente Nueva as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Gente Nueva

descriptions: Los Pelones announced they were part of the Gulf Cartel in 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: On December 27, 2012, the group announced that they had stopped operating independently and that now they are part of the 'honorable' Gulf Cartel.

descriptions: Los Pelones are now part of the Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Pelones in Morelos. These are former enforcers of the Beltrán-Leyva brothers, now part of the Gulf Cartel.

descriptions: Los Pelones was originally a part of the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Pelones is an enforcer gang originally part of the Mexican drug trafficking organization known as the Sinaloa Cartel

Petit Bar Gang.description: The Petit Bar Gang is a Corsican organized crime group named after the 'Petit Bar' in Ajaccio. It engages in extortion, racketeering, money laundering, and other criminal activities, with influence in Corsica, mainland France, and abroad. Founded in the 2000s, it was described in 2022 as the most powerful criminal group in Corsica, with a network of political and economic influence. The gang has been involved in multiple assassinations and is led by Jacques Santoni.

descriptions: Petit Bar Gang is listed as a component of the Corsican mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Petit Bar Gang

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: Petit Bar Gang is listed as a rival of Gang de la Brise de Mer.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Petit Bar Gang , Venzolasca Gang , Armata Corsa

descriptions: The Petit Bar Gang and Mattei clan are two principal blocs in Corsican organized crime, with the Mattei clan seeking to unify groups.
edges.evidence_quote: The report highlighted their infiltration into economic sectors such as construction, hospitality and real estate, and noted the emergence of two principal blocs: one linked to the Petit Bar Gang in Ajaccio and another associated with the Mattei clan, which has sought to unify various groups.

Zetas Vieja Escuela.description: Mexican criminal organization that splintered from Los Zetas in 2014, founded by José Guizar Valencia (Z-43) and Antonio Salas Perea. Based in northern Veracruz, it operates in multiple Mexican states, engaging in drug trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, murder, and oil theft. The group claims to continue the original Zetas' brutal methods. It is currently active and rivals the Jalisco New Generation Cartel and Cártel del Noreste.

descriptions: Cártel del Noreste and Zetas Vieja Escuela are rivals.

descriptions: Zetas Vieja Escuela was part of an alliance against Cártel del Noreste.
edges.evidence_quote: As of March 2016, Grupo Bravo (Bravo Group), Los Talibanes (The Talibans), and Zetas Vieja Escuela (Old School Zetas) had formed an alliance with the Gulf Cartel against Cártel del Noreste (Cartel of the Northeast).

descriptions: Zetas Vieja Escuela and Jalisco New Generation Cartel engaged in violent clashes, with each side killing members of the other.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 2019, members of the Jalisco New Generation Cartel executed a member of the Zetas Vieja Escuela, possibly in the state of Veracruz. On April 2, members of the ZVE shot dead three people (one woman and two men) alleged members of the CJNG, abandoning them in the center of the municipality of José Azueta , in southern Veracruz.

descriptions: CJNG ejecutó a un miembro de Zetas Vieja Escuela, indicando conflicto.
edges.evidence_quote: En marzo del 2019, miembros del Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación ejecutaron a un miembro de los Zetas Vieja Escuela, posiblemente en el estado de Veracruz .

descriptions: Zetas Vieja Escuela es una escisión de Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Zetas Vieja Escuela o Zetas Vieja Guardia , es una organización criminal escindida de Los Zetas .

descriptions: A Gypsy Joker member shot and wounded a member of the Newboys gang.
edges.evidence_quote: He shot and wounded a member of the Newboys gang and former Hells Angel outside their clubhouse in Adelaide, South Australia.
